title: Content Core
description: A Modpack for Content Creators to create Videos and more
body:
# **Content Core – The Ultimate Modpack for Content Creators**
_Lightweight. Cinematic. Powerful._

Content Core is built for creators who turn Minecraft into more than just a game. Whether you're making YouTube series, cinematic videos, or just want beautiful visuals with smooth performance, this pack gives you the essential tools for professional-looking content.

## Flashback Mod – Cinematic Storytelling, Made Easy
The Flashback mod allows you to create in-game flashbacks, time rewinds, and narrative transitions with ease. Perfect for roleplay servers, Minecraft films, or dramatic Let's Plays.

![The Flashback Editor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0493215e6233efafdfad69d32eb40e5f04a45ecc.png)


## Sodium – Maximum FPS for Recording and Streaming
Sodium significantly boosts performance, making sure your game stays smooth even while recording or using shaders. Ideal for creators with demanding setups or those who want the highest FPS possible.

![Sodium enhances the FPS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b7f12fd5dc6c2f0322d42e9a32fe6c16c0c02ce3.png)


## Iris – Full Shader Support with Performance in Mind
Enable high-quality shaders like Complementary, BSL, or Nostalgia without sacrificing performance. Iris works seamlessly with Sodium to give you stunning visuals that don’t lag your recordings.

![Shader Support with Iris](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a5ab50888e7c619fa335b4b7d2e6491e03298da9.png)
